ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Label for the size (e.g., S, M, L, XL, 2XL) */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand associated with the size */,
  "size_type" TEXT /* Type of size (e.g., petite, regular, plus) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender (e.g., women) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_specifications" (
  "spec_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specification */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size being specified */,
  "bust" REAL /* Bust measurement in cm */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist measurement in cm */,
  "dress_length" REAL /* Length of the dress in cm */,
  "sleeve_length" REAL /* Length of the sleeve in cm */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of product (e.g., dress, top, bottom) */,
  "hip" REAL /* Hip measurement in cm */,
  "shoulder_width" REAL /* Shoulder width measurement in cm */,
  "inseam_length" REAL /* Inseam length measurement in cm */,
  "fabric_type" TEXT /* Fabric type (e.g., cotton, silk) */,
  "fit" TEXT /* Fit description (e.g., loose, fitted, relaxed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spec_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_specifications_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size associated with the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., dresses, tops) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity in stock */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand associated with the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the product */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "brand_description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "brand_url" TEXT /* URL to the brand's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "popularity" (
  "popularity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each popularity record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of times the product has been viewed */,
  "purchases" INTEGER /* Number of times the product has been purchased */,
  "returns" INTEGER /* Number of times the product has been returned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("popularity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_popularity_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_popularity_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
